ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "time_start" TEXT /* Start time of the experiment */,
  "time_end" TEXT /* End time of the experiment */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research site */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species of the primate */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the individual subject */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the subject */,
  "cup_distance" REAL /* Distance of the cup from the subject */,
  "task_experience" TEXT /* Level of experience the subject has with the task */,
  "board_size" TEXT /* Size of the board used in the experiment */,
  "test_situation" INTEGER /* Situation of the test (e.g., group, individual) */,
  "session" INTEGER /* Session number of the experiment */,
  "block" INTEGER /* Block number within the session */,
  "trial" INTEGER /* Trial number within the block */,
  "condition" INTEGER /* Condition of the experiment */,
  "hiding_location" INTEGER /* Location where the object was hidden */,
  "pick" INTEGER /* Order of the pick */,
  "secondary_pick" INTEGER /* Order of the secondary pick (if applicable) */,
  "correct" INTEGER /* Whether the subject's response was correct */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher conducting the experiment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Additional comments about the trial */,
  "environment_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during the experiment */,
  "task_description" TEXT /* Description of the task performed */,
  "video_link" TEXT /* Link to the video recording of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_condition FOREIGN KEY ("condition") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_test_situation FOREIGN KEY ("test_situation") REFERENCES test_situations ("situation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the research site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the research site */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* GPS coordinates of the site */,
  "facility_details" TEXT /* Details about the facilities available at the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the species */,
  "average_lifespan" INTEGER /* Average lifespan of the species in years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the individual subject */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species of the subject */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the subject */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Current health status of the subject */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the researcher belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_situations" (
  "situation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test situation */,
  "situation_name" TEXT /* Name of the test situation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test situation */,
  "setup_requirements" TEXT /* Specific setup requirements for the test situation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("situation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "difficulty_level" INTEGER /* Quantifiable difficulty level of the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment */,
  "session" INTEGER /* Session number of the experiment */,
  "block" INTEGER /* Block number within the session */,
  "trial" INTEGER /* Trial number within the block */,
  "correct" INTEGER /* Whether the subject's response was correct */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Additional comments about the trial */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the trial */,
  "behavior_notes" TEXT /* Detailed notes on the subject's behavior during the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
